title: Minato's Flying Raijin X Ender Pearl
description: This resource pack transforms the Minecraft Ender Pearl into Minato Namikaze’s Flying Raijin Kunai with a clean anime style and teleportation vibes perfect for Naruto fans and stylish PvP gameplay
body:
#  ⚡ Minato’s Flying Raijin X Ender Pearl ⚡

## Be the Yellow Flash in your Minecraft world!

Minato’s Flying Raijin X Ender Pearl replaces the default Ender Pearl with a custom anime style design inspired by Minato Namikaze’s Flying Raijin Kunai. Every throw feels like you’re marking space with pure teleportation speed.

This pack focuses on a simple yet glowing anime aesthetic, keeping the design clean while still giving it that iconic Naruto-inspired energy.


### 📦 Supported Versions

-   Minecraft 1.20 – 1.26.2
-   Compatible with Vanilla, Fabric, and Forge
-   Compatible with Vanilla, Sodium and Optifine


### 💡 Installation
- Download the resource pack
- Place it in your resourcepacks folder (minecraft/resourcepacks/)
- Enable it in Minecraft settings
- Done 
- Now Become The Yellow Flash Of The Leaf ⚡


### 🌀 Note
- Only model and texture are changed
- No changes to teleport sound or particles
- Focus is on a clean Flying Raijin visual experience
